creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
Not necessarily.  e.g.:

% telnet 13.2.116.11
Trying 13.2.116.11...
Connected to crevenia.parc.xerox.com.

telnet did a DNS lookup to be able to print "Connected to ...".

Does using the "-n" flag to ping change whether or not you have this
delay problem?

  Bill
